AUG. 31, 1995 DEPT #5, JUDGE ERIC LABOWITZ, CSR LESLIE GARBE CLERK G. MCGREW. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFTS. ORAL AND WRITTEN EVIDENCE TAKEN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIESMAN, DANA WIESMAN, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 400 ALABAMA ST, UNIT #500, S.F, CA $4,820.00 RENT, $189.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,009.25, LEASE FORFEITED
